/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/hf_server.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/hf_server.dir/home/lex/Documents/trading_app/backend/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_server.dir/home/lex/Documents/trading_app/backend/database/connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_server.dir/home/lex/Documents/trading_app/backend/database/repository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_server.dir/home/lex/Documents/trading_app/backend/core/statistics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_server.dir/home/lex/Documents/trading_app/backend/core/data_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_server.dir/home/lex/Documents/trading_app/backend/core/strategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_server.dir/home/lex/Documents/trading_app/backend/core/backtester.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_server.dir/home/lex/Documents/trading_app/backend/core/risk_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_server.dir/home/lex/Documents/trading_app/backend/core/live_trader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_server.dir/home/lex/Documents/trading_app/backend/brokers/mock_broker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_server.dir/home/lex/Documents/trading_app/backend/brokers/rest_broker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_server.dir/home/lex/Documents/trading_app/backend/api/auth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_server.dir/home/lex/Documents/trading_app/backend/api/data_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_server.dir/home/lex/Documents/trading_app/backend/api/strategy_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_server.dir/home/lex/Documents/trading_app/backend/api/backtest_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_server.dir/home/lex/Documents/trading_app/backend/api/trading_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_server.dir/home/lex/Documents/trading_app/backend/api/portfolio_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_server.dir/home/lex/Documents/trading_app/backend/api/risk_api.cpp.o -o hf_server  _deps/sqlitecpp-build/libSQLiteCpp.a _deps/sqlitecpp-build/sqlite3/libsqlite3.a -ldl
